items.title: COVER Corporation Collaborates with We’s Star Ltd. for Mori Calliope themed New Liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月”
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced an upcoming collaboration between VTuber agency hololive production and We’s Star Ltd. (Taichung City, Taiwan) for the new Mori Calliope themed liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月”. Following the 2023 release of “もり桜・金箔” and the 2024 release of “もり桜・一輪花” the latest creation, “もり桜・花鳥風月” will be available starting June 10th, 2025.

This collaboration is a fusion of “森カリオペ” unique charm and the refined aesthetic of “花道物語” “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月” is inspired by the concept of “beautiful natural scenery,” capturing the visual and flavor profile of cherry blossoms. It delivers a unique experience characteristic of sakura liqueur.

: For individual purchases, tapestry (one of the four illustration designs) will be shipped randomly.

: Scheduled to start around June 2025

About 重星戰略, We’s Star LTD. Aligned with the strategic rhythm of the global market, We’s Star LTD. gathers experts in prototyping, art, and marketing to create outstanding IP works with high standards. The company invests in the international market, collaborating with world-class IPs, companies, brands, and partners to build global strategies.

We’s Star Official X (Twitter)：

https://x.com/wesstar_corp 重星戰略企劃有限公司 / 重星戦略大阪株式会社

items.title: HyperX x IRyS Collaboration Keycap and Headset Accessory are Now Available
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation has announced a collaboration between HyperX and hololive production, introducing an exclusive keycap and headset accessory featuring IRyS of hololive English -Promise-.

The keycaps and headset accessory will be available on the HyperX official website starting May 27th at 12 PM PST.

items.title: hololive production 2nd World Tour Concert “hololive STAGE World Tour’25 -Synchronize!-” Key Visual, New Cities, New Guests, and Merchandise Announcement
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) is pleased to announce the key visual, new cities, special guests, and merchandise for the second world tour concert, “hololive STAGE World Tour’25 -Synchronize!”.

The key visual for “hololive STAGE World Tour’25 -Synchronize!” has now been unveiled. It features Momosuzu Nene, Kureiji Ollie, Mori Calliope, IRyS, and Nerissa Ravencroft dressed in stylish costumes.

Additional information on special guests has also been released.

First, Fuwawa Abyssgard and Mococo Abyssgard of hololive English -Advent- will be special guests at the Vancouver show. Akai Haato and Natsuiro Matsuri of the hololive 1st generation will appear at the New York show. Stay tuned for more information about guests at upcoming shows.

Two cities that have been newly added to the world tour have also been revealed. The first is Seoul. This will be the first time hololive production performs a 3D concert there. The second is Taipei. Taipei was on the world tour last year and will be again this year. More information about the Seoul and Taipei concert dates and venues will be announced at a later date.

An original theme song for the world tour is currently in the works. It will be sung by Momosuzu Nene, Kureiji Ollie, Mori Calliope, IRyS, and Nerissa Ravencroft. Please look forward to its release!

items.title: Makeship and hololive production Announce Adorable New Plushie Collection Featuring hololive English -Advent-!
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) announced today the release of the MAKESHIP x hololive English -Advent- exclusive plush collection, featuring members of hololive English -Advent-.

The collection of plushies featuring the five captivating members of hololive English -Advent-: Nerissa Ravencroft, Shiori Novella, Koseki Bijou, and the twin hounds Fuwawa Abyssgard and Mococo Abyssgard.

Following the overwhelming support for previous hololive production and Makeship collaborations, this new project will allow fans worldwide to bring home their very own cuddly companions inspired by the unique personalities and iconic designs of hololive English -Advent- members. Each plushie has been crafted to capture the lovely relationships between each member and their mascots.

The plushie campaign will run for a limited time. Visit the Makeship website during the campaign to pre-order your favorite hololive English -Advent- members plushies and help bring this exciting project to life. Get ready, adventurers!

MAKESHIP x hololive English -Promise- Plushie Collection

Makeship is a platform that empowers creators and communities to bring their unique ideas to life through limited-edition physical products, primarily plushies. By utilizing a crowdfunding model, Makeship ensures that only successfully funded projects are produced, fostering a direct connection between creators and their fans.

items.title: CAPSULE x hololive production x “Cheer UP” Event Comes to Los Angeles
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced that the CAPSULE x hololive production collaboration eventcollaboration event “Cheer UP road running” and “Theme Café” will take place in Los Angeles, USA, this autumn.

The collaboration event “Cheer UP” will be held with the cheerleading style of concept, there will be limited merchandise and foods featuring members of hololive production including Oozora Subaru and Usada Pekora of hololive, Kaela Kovalskia and Kobo Kanaeru of hololive Indonesia, and Mori Calliope and Koseki Bijou of hololive English.

hololive production Cheer UP Fun Run

$125 Ticket Includes: • Runner Bib • Official Event T-shirt • Medal • One Magnetic Badge

$185 Ticket Includes Everything Above, Plus: • Sports Towel

Early Bird Perk and Exclusive Merchandise Participants who register by June 15, 2025, will receive a special early registration gift: A randomly selected sticker set.

Available only at the run, the official camping chair will be sold as a Fun Run limited item. This special piece is designed as a premium collectible for fans.

hololive production Cheer UP Pop-Up Café

Dates: October 18 – December 6, 2025 Place: 171 Live Oak Ave Suite D, Arcadia, CA 91006

Food and Drinks details will be announced later.

#hololiveCheerUP #hololiveFunRun #hololiveCafe #hololiveUSA #OUENEVENTUSA

items.title: hololive production Collaboration with Manhattan Portage
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation announced a collaboration with the iconic New York bag brand, Manhattan Portage. This collaboration will feature hololive English talents from hololive English -Advent- and hololive English -Justice-, in a special collection that merges the unique styles of these VTubers with Manhattan Portage’s urban aesthetic. Manhattan Portage, celebrated for its “New York Tough” ethos and high-quality bags designed for the dynamic urban environment, has been a signature brand all across the globe. This partnership aims to bring together the vibrant energy of hololive English -Advent- and hololive English -Justice- with Manhattan Portage’s commitment to creating practical, stylish, and enduring products!

The collaboration will feature a range of bags, starting from Manhattan Portage’s signature messenger bag to waist bags, backpacks, and mini shoulder bags, designed with special themes inspired by hololive English -Advent- and hololive English -Justice-, incorporating their distinctive colors and logo designs.

hololive production Collaboration with Manhattan Portage

Pre-Order Period: May 8th, 2025 11:00AM – June 8th, 2025 (EST)

Born in New York City in 1983, Manhattan Portage designs durable and functional bags for urban living. The brand’s iconic messenger bags and other products are known for their quality craftsmanship and timeless style, embodying the “New York Tough” spirit.

items.title: OMOCAT x hololive English -Myth- New Plushie Collection
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation has announced that the pre-order of OMOCAT x hololive English -Myth- plushie collection started on April 30th at 5:00 PM (PST).

OMOCAT x hololive English -Myth- plushie collection, a collaboration project between hololive English -Myth- and OMOCAT, an apparel brand known for its popularity in the U.S. and worldwide, released its new collection, featuring the talents of hololive English -Myth-. This collection includes 6.5″ tall plushies made with 100% polyester/100% PP cotton.

Pre-order is available on the OMOCAT website. Please check it out!

OMOCAT x hololive English -Myth- plushie collection Line-up: Takanashi Kiara plush Gawr Gura plush

* Will be Shipped from the United States, and the expected arrival for the items will be around October 2025. For more information on shipping, please visit the OMOCAT official website.

OMOCAT is a L.A.-based indie apparel and merchandise brand that eclectically blends together illustration, anime subculture, and street fashion. Established in 2013, OMOCAT’s original take on graphic apparel has garnered the attention of art enthusiasts and the pop culture community through the years.
